supply_chain.dependencies: Reliance on independent insurance agents for distribution; reinsurance counterparties for risk transfer
supply_chain.risks: Reinsurer insolvency or inability to pay; concentration of premium in single agencies; technology system failures; vendor operational risks

regulatory_risks: State insurance regulatory changes restricting rate increases
Limitations on use of credit-based factors in pricing
Federal regulation changes (potential federal system vs state-based)
Privacy laws (Gramm-Leach-Bliley Act, Fair Credit Reporting Act, HIPAA)
U.S. Foreign Corrupt Practices Act (FCPA) compliance
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) regulations
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act
UK Prudential Regulation Authority (PRA) and Financial Conduct Authority (FCA) regulations
Artificial intelligence (AI) usage restrictions in pricing
Tax law changes affecting municipal bond interest and dividend income

sanction_risks: Exposure to insured losses related to wars in Ukraine and Middle East through reinsurance treaties
Potential expansion of wars beyond current regions affecting investment portfolio and insurance operations
Limited direct exposure to Russia, Ukraine, Israel, Gaza but indirect exposure through reinsurance
